3085960.name: Savage Islands
3085960.description:
Savage Islands is an action-adventure game that challenges you to survive on a perilous island filled with dangers. As a pirate, you'll need to gather tools, water, and food to fend off enemies and make it out alive.

The graphics in Savage Islands boast a wide range of characters and numerous 3D environments. The game offers more than what meets the eye, with danger lurking in every corner and unexpected risks even in seemingly safe areas. Fortunately, the controls are intuitive, allowing you to navigate with a virtual cross-pad and execute actions with the corresponding buttons.

In Savage Islands, you have a backpack to store the tools and weapons you scavenge. This ensures you're always prepared to increase your chances of survival. You can collect hand axes for woodcutting and knives for crafting essential items. Use these weapons to defend yourself against the enemies.

For those seeking the thrill of surviving on an open world savage island, Savage Islands offers the perfect mix of action and adventure. Stay alert, watch out for enemies, gather resources, and build your own forts to stay alive.
